chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Civil Revision Application No.95 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on C.M.A No.1506/2025 2.
